The [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]] '''Scalphunter rifle''' was an experimental blaster designed and created by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. It was fully automatic with [[Stock/Legends|collapsible stock]], [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] alloy [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]] and long-range spectrum microscope.

A number of the weapons were stolen by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

In ''[[The Bounty Hunter Code]]'', [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] mentioned that, along with the [[EE-3 carbine rifle/Legends|EE-3 Carbine rifle]] and [[Firestar 10-K|Firestar 10-k]], the scalphunter rifle had a good balance of firepower, accuracy and weight.

{{Weapon-stub}}
